scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) uses supplied parser and resolves baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document produced by parser.parseInput, with baseUri applied
pseudocode: TEST TC10 parse with html, baseUri, parser

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName) loads file content with charset and file path as baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed text matches file content and baseUri is file path
pseudocode: TEST TC11 parse file with charsetName

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName, String baseUri, Parser parser) invokes DataUtil with parser override
scenarios.expectedResult: Document from DataUtil.load with correct baseUri and parser behavior
pseudocode: TEST TC12 parse file with charset, baseUri, parser
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(file, charset, baseUri, parser);

scenarios.description: parse(Path path, String charsetName, String baseUri) loads HTML via Path
scenarios.precondition: temporary HTML file exists at Path
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed content matches and baseUri equals supplied baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC13 parse path with charset and baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(Path path, String charsetName) infers baseUri from path and reads charset
scenarios.precondition: temporary HTML file exists at Path
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed content matches and baseUri equals path.toAbsolutePath()
pseudocode: TEST TC14 parse path with charset only

scenarios.description: parse(Path path) auto-detects charset and uses absolute path as baseUri
scenarios.precondition: temporary HTML file exists at Path without charset metadata
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed content and baseUri equals path.toAbsolutePath()

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in, String charsetName, String baseUri) reads and closes stream
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed Document from stream and correct baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC16 parse InputStream with charset and baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in, String charsetName, String baseUri, Parser parser) applies parser to InputStream
scenarios.expectedResult: Parsed Document with parser settings and baseUri applied
pseudocode: TEST TC17 parse InputStream with parser override
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(in, charset, baseUri, parser);
